description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a mix of green lawn and a tan area, possibly representing a driveway or patio. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design with large windows and a prominent entryway. The front facade includes a central entrance flanked by symmetrical window arrangements, while the rear and sides show additional large windows and sliding doors, suggesting open-plan living spaces. The driveway leads directly to the main entrance, and the building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco with glass elements. The roof is flat and likely accessible for maintenance but not designed for regular use. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric lines and open, airy interiors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist design set on a green and tan plot. The structure features a central entrance, symmetrical window arrangements, and a driveway leading to the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading up to the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated profile, large side windows, and the transition between green lawn and tan area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional large windows and sliding doors, with the tan area extending along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance or garage area and more window placements along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large side and rear windows
